requirement_topic.en: Armenia Grid Connection — PSRC / ENA Review, Anti-Islanding, and 220/380 V 50 Hz Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 亚美尼亚并网——PSRC / ENA审查、防孤岛及220/380 V 50 Hz参数
requirement_topic.zht: 亞美尼亞併網——PSRC / ENA審查、防孤島及220/380 V 50 Hz參數

summary.en: Solar PV inverter deployment in Armenia is not only a product-certification question. Project connection depends on electricity-sector rules overseen by the Public Services Regulatory Commission (PSRC) and technical connection by Electric Networks of Armenia (ENA) for distribution projects, with HVEN relevant for transmission-level projects. Armenia's commonly stated low-voltage supply is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, so inverter firmware, protection thresholds, reconnection delays, frequency windows, and anti-islanding behavior should be validated for local network settings. For autonomous producers, distributed PV, Masrik-1 / Ayg-1 style utility projects, or other grid-connected solar projects, ENA / project-owner documentation may request IEC-aligned evidence such as IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface behavior.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚太阳能光伏逆变器部署不只是产品认证问题。项目接入取决于公共服务监管委员会（PSRC）监管的电力行业规则，以及配电项目由亚美尼亚电网公司（ENA）执行的技术接入；输电级项目还可能涉及HVEN。亚美尼亚常见低压供电为220/380 V、50 Hz，因此逆变器固件、保护阈值、重连延迟、频率窗口和防孤岛行为应按当地电网参数验证。对于自主生产者、分布式光伏、Masrik-1 / Ayg-1类型公用事业级项目或其他并网太阳能项目，ENA / 项目业主文件可能要求IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727并网接口行为等IEC对齐证据。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞太陽能光伏逆變器部署不只是產品認證問題。項目接入取決於公共服務監管委員會（PSRC）監管的電力行業規則，以及配電項目由亞美尼亞電網公司（ENA）執行的技術接入；輸電級項目還可能涉及HVEN。亞美尼亞常見低壓供電為220/380 V、50 Hz，因此逆變器韌體、保護閾值、重連延遲、頻率窗口和防孤島行為應按當地電網參數驗證。對於自主生產者、分散式光伏、Masrik-1 / Ayg-1類型公用事業級項目或其他併網太陽能項目，ENA / 項目業主文件可能要求IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727併網介面行為等IEC對齊證據。

standards_or_laws: PSRC electricity-sector regulatory decisions and autonomous-producer / net-metering rules where applicable
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
Armenia low-voltage grid expectation: 220/380 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: China-side grid evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024 for photovoltaic power stations connected to power systems, NB/T 32004 for PV grid-connected inverter technical specifications, GB/T 37408-2021 technical requirements, and domestic anti-islanding or grid-code test results. These documents are based on Chinese grid rules and manufacturer settings. They can help explain the product baseline but do not transfer automatically to Armenia's PSRC / ENA connection review or project-owner requirements.
summary.zh: 中国侧并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定、NB/T 32004光伏并网逆变器技术规范、GB/T 37408-2021技术要求，以及国内防孤岛或电网规范测试结果。这些文件基于中国电网规则和制造商设置，可用于说明产品基线，但不会自动转移为亚美尼亚PSRC / ENA接入审查或项目业主要求的合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國側併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定、NB/T 32004光伏併網逆變器技術規範、GB/T 37408-2021技術要求，以及國內防孤島或電網規範測試結果。這些文件基於中國電網規則和製造商設定，可用於說明產品基線，但不會自動轉移為亞美尼亞PSRC / ENA接入審查或項目業主要求的合規證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese grid-code and anti-islanding reports are not ENA connection approvals. Exporters should prepare an Armenia-specific grid-settings table, IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence where requested, firmware parameter records for 220/380 V 50 Hz operation, and project-specific responses to ENA or HVEN technical conditions. The EAEU / EAC product route does not replace PSRC / ENA connection review; both may be relevant.
gap.zh: 差距：中国电网规范和防孤岛报告不是ENA接入批准。出口商应准备亚美尼亚专用电网参数表、按要求提供IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据、220/380 V 50 Hz运行的固件参数记录，以及针对ENA或HVEN技术条件的项目专用答复。EAEU / EAC产品路径不能替代PSRC / ENA并网审查；两者可能同时相关。
gap.zht: 差距：中國電網規範和防孤島報告不是ENA接入批准。出口商應準備亞美尼亞專用電網參數表、按要求提供IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據、220/380 V 50 Hz運行的韌體參數記錄，以及針對ENA或HVEN技術條件的項目專用答覆。EAEU / EAC產品路徑不能替代PSRC / ENA併網審查；兩者可能同時相關。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for project grid connection where PSRC rules, ENA distribution conditions, HVEN transmission requirements, or project-owner specifications apply
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China-side grid operator or purchaser requirements but does not transfer automatically to Armenia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat ENA or HVEN technical conditions and PSRC electricity-sector rules as separate project gates from Chinese GB/T grid evidence and from EAEU/EAC product conformity. Validate anti-islanding, reconnection, voltage, and frequency settings for Armenia's 220/380 V, 50 Hz network before connection submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将ENA或HVEN技术条件及PSRC电力行业规则视为独立于中国GB/T并网证据和EAEU/EAC产品符合性的项目门槛。提交接入申请前，请针对亚美尼亚220/380 V、50 Hz电网验证防孤岛、重连、电压和频率设置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將ENA或HVEN技術條件及PSRC電力行業規則視為獨立於中國GB/T併網證據和EAEU/EAC產品符合性的項目門檻。提交接入申請前，請針對亞美尼亞220/380 V、50 Hz電網驗證防孤島、重連、電壓和頻率設定。

requirement_topic.en: PSRC Autonomous-Producer / Net-Metering Context for Distributed Solar
requirement_topic.zh: PSRC自主生产者 / 净计量背景下的分布式太阳能
requirement_topic.zht: PSRC自主生產者 / 淨計量背景下的分散式太陽能

summary.en: Armenia has a growing distributed-solar market under PSRC-supervised electricity rules, including autonomous-producer and net-metering style arrangements, while larger projects such as Masrik-1 and Ayg-1 show utility-scale solar development. For distributed projects, the inverter compliance package is typically reviewed in the context of the customer's connection capacity, metering arrangement, ENA technical conditions, and safety of parallel operation. Equipment acceptance should therefore be checked at project level, not assumed from a Chinese distributed-PV approval or manufacturer catalogue entry.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚在PSRC监管的电力规则下发展分布式太阳能市场，包括自主生产者和类似净计量的安排；Masrik-1和Ayg-1等项目也显示公用事业级太阳能增长。对于分布式项目，逆变器合规资料通常会结合客户接入容量、计量安排、ENA技术条件和平行运行安全进行审查。因此，设备接受应按项目层面核实，而不能从中国分布式光伏审批或制造商目录条目中直接推定。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞在PSRC監管的電力規則下發展分散式太陽能市場，包括自主生產者和類似淨計量的安排；Masrik-1和Ayg-1等項目也顯示公用事業級太陽能增長。對於分散式項目，逆變器合規資料通常會結合客戶接入容量、計量安排、ENA技術條件和平行運行安全進行審查。因此，設備接受應按項目層面核實，而不能從中國分散式光伏審批或製造商目錄條目中直接推定。

standards_or_laws: PSRC electricity-sector rules for autonomous producers and renewable-energy connection arrangements
ENA metering and technical connection conditions for distribution-connected generators
IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence where required by the project or connection reviewer

summary.en: China's distributed PV connection practice is governed by Chinese energy-policy documents, local grid-company procedures, and China domestic inverter standards. Those approvals and installer processes do not create eligibility for Armenia's autonomous-producer, net-metering, or ENA connection arrangements.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏接入实践受中国能源政策文件、地方电网公司程序和中国国内逆变器标准约束。这些审批和安装商流程不会产生亚美尼亚自主生产者、净计量或ENA接入安排下的设备资格。
summary.zht: 中國分散式光伏接入實務受中國能源政策文件、地方電網公司程序和中國國內逆變器標準約束。這些審批和安裝商流程不會產生亞美尼亞自主生產者、淨計量或ENA接入安排下的設備資格。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: Armenia distributed-solar eligibility is a PSRC / ENA project and metering question, not a China domestic product-list question. Confirm model documentation, EAC status if in scope, Armenian/Russian/English manuals as requested, grid settings, and installer or customer responsibilities before committing inventory.
gap.zh: 差距：亚美尼亚分布式太阳能资格是PSRC / ENA项目和计量问题，不是中国国内产品清单问题。承诺库存前，应确认型号文件、适用时的EAC状态、按要求提供的亚美尼亚语/俄语/英语说明书、电网参数，以及安装商或客户责任。
gap.zht: 差距：亞美尼亞分散式太陽能資格是PSRC / ENA項目和計量問題，不是中國國內產品清單問題。承諾庫存前，應確認型號文件、適用時的EAC狀態、按要求提供的亞美尼亞語/俄語/英語說明書、電網參數，以及安裝商或客戶責任。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the installation seeks PSRC/ENA-recognized distributed generation, autonomous-producer treatment, net-metering treatment, or distribution-grid parallel operation
mandatory_status.cn: China distributed-PV approvals and domestic catalogues are not transferable to Armenia

source.publisher: Public Services Regulatory Commission of the Republic of Armenia (PSRC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm PSRC autonomous-producer or net-metering rules and ENA connection conditions for each distributed PV project. A Chinese distributed-PV approval or GB/T inverter report is supporting background only and should not be treated as Armenia project eligibility.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 请逐项目确认PSRC自主生产者或净计量规则及ENA接入条件。中国分布式光伏审批或GB/T逆变器报告仅为背景支持材料，不应视为亚美尼亚项目资格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 請逐項目確認PSRC自主生產者或淨計量規則及ENA接入條件。中國分散式光伏審批或GB/T逆變器報告僅為背景支持材料，不應視為亞美尼亞項目資格。
